title: Top 10 Hotel POS Systems 2026: Restaurant & Payment Guide
description: Compare hospitality pos solutions for hotels. Review 8 essential options analyzed. Find the best solution for your hotel Make informed decisions today.
content:
Hotel POS Systems: Digital Hub for Restaurant Operations

Hotel POS (Point of Sale) systems are core tools for hotel restaurant operations, covering four scenarios: restaurant management, bar management, SPA management, and front desk cashier. In 2026, hotel restaurant POS upgraded from traditional hardware to cloud systems, with mobile POS, cloud cashier, and payment integration becoming three major trends. Traditional hotel POS relied on local hardware, offline cashier, and manual accounting, resulting in low efficiency and difficult integration. Cloud POS solves these pain points through mobile devices, real-time cashier, and payment integration, improving restaurant operational efficiency and guest experience. This article deeply reviews three mainstream hotel POS systems: Oracle MICROS, Infrasys, and Quantum POS, providing decision basis for hotel restaurant digitalization.

Core Review Platform Introduction

Oracle MICROS: Hotel POS Industry Benchmark System

Oracle MICROS originates from MICROS Systems, acquired by Oracle in 2014 to become a flagship hotel POS product. It serves 60000+ hotel clients globally, covering Marriott, Hilton, InterContinental and other top hotel groups. MICROS core advantage lies in hotel POS professionalism, with restaurant POS, bar POS, SPA POS, and front desk POS four scenarios integrated deployment. MICROS is particularly suitable for large hotel groups, with multi-format POS integration, group management, and complex bill processing matching large hotel needs. MICROS stability has been verified for decades, meeting high-end hotel strict requirements for POS reliability.

Infrasys: Cloud Innovative Hotel POS System

Infrasys originates from Oracle Hospitality and is a cloud innovative hotel POS system. It serves 5000+ hotel clients globally, focusing on cloud POS, mobile POS, and payment integration. Infrasys core advantage lies in cloud architecture, with mobile device POS cashier, cloud bill management, and real-time payment integration. Restaurant servers can order and cashier through iPad mobile POS, improving service efficiency and guest experience. Infrasys is particularly suitable for hotels with strong mobile needs, with mobile POS improving restaurant service efficiency.

Quantum POS: Asia-Pacific Innovative Hotel POS System

Quantum POS was established in 2010, headquartered in Singapore, and is an Asia-Pacific innovative hotel POS system. It serves 3000+ hotel clients globally, focusing on Asia-Pacific hotel restaurant POS, bar POS, and SPA POS. Quantum POS core advantage lies in Asia-Pacific localization, with Asia-Pacific local payment integration, local language support, and local dining habit adaptation. Asia-Pacific hotels can use Quantum POS local payments (Alipay, WeChat Pay), local dining habits (Chinese dish classification), and local language (Chinese interface). Quantum POS is particularly suitable for Asia-Pacific hotels, with localization adaptation improving operational efficiency.

Restaurant Management Capability Comparison

Restaurant Ordering Function

Restaurant ordering function is a core module of hotel POS, covering four functions: dish management, table management, ordering process, and order modification. Oracle MICROS restaurant ordering function is most complete, with dish library management (classification, images, prices), table map management, ordering process customization, and order modification records. Restaurants can improve ordering process and service efficiency through MICROS. Infrasys restaurant ordering function is mobile convenient, with iPad mobile ordering, table map, and dish image display. Quantum POS restaurant ordering function is Asia-Pacific localized, with Chinese dish classification, table reservation, and ordering shortcuts.

Restaurant Cashier Function

Restaurant cashier function is a key module of hotel POS, covering four functions: bill generation, payment processing, bill splitting management, and invoice issuance. Oracle MICROS restaurant cashier function is most complete, with complex bill processing (multi-person bill splitting, dish bill splitting), payment channel integration (credit cards, cash, mobile payments), and invoice issuance integration. Restaurants can improve cashier process and cashier efficiency through MICROS. Infrasys restaurant cashier function is mobile convenient, with iPad mobile cashier and mobile payment integration. Quantum POS restaurant cashier function is Asia-Pacific localized, with local payment integration (Alipay, WeChat Pay) and local invoice issuance.

Restaurant Report Function

Restaurant report function is a management module of hotel POS, covering three reports: revenue reports, dish sales reports, and server efficiency reports. Oracle MICROS restaurant report function is most complete, with revenue reports (daily revenue, monthly revenue, annual revenue), dish sales reports (popular dishes, slow-selling dishes), and server efficiency reports (tables served, average bill). Restaurant managers can analyze restaurant operations and optimize dish strategies through MICROS reports. Infrasys restaurant report function is cloud real-time, with cloud revenue reports and real-time dish sales. Quantum POS restaurant report function is basic complete, with basic revenue reports and dish sales reports.

Restaurant Reservation Management

Restaurant reservation management is a supplementary module of hotel POS, covering three functions: reservation records, table reservations, and reservation reminders. Infrasys restaurant reservation management is mobile convenient, with iPad reservation records, table reservation map, and reservation time reminders. Restaurants can reduce reservation conflicts through Infrasys reservation management. Oracle MICROS restaurant reservation management requires extra configuration, with MICROS Reservations module. Quantum POS restaurant reservation management is basic, with basic reservation records.

Payment Integration Capability Comparison

Credit Card Payment Integration

Credit card payment integration is basic payment for hotel POS, including Visa, Mastercard, American Express and other credit card payment channels. Oracle MICROS credit card payment integration is most complete, integrating global mainstream credit card payment channels, payment terminal integration, and payment security certification. Hotels can meet global guest needs through MICROS credit card payment. Infrasys credit card payment integration is cloud-based, with cloud payment terminal integration. Quantum POS credit card payment integration is Asia-Pacific localized, with Asia-Pacific credit card payment integration.

Mobile Payment Integration

Mobile payment integration is emerging payment for hotel POS, including Apple Pay, Google Pay, Alipay, WeChat Pay and other mobile payment channels. Quantum POS mobile payment integration is strongest in Asia-Pacific, deeply integrating Alipay, WeChat Pay, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. Asia-Pacific hotels can meet Asia-Pacific guest needs through Quantum POS local mobile payments. Infrasys mobile payment integration is cloud-based, with Apple Pay and Google Pay integration. Oracle MICROS mobile payment integration requires extra configuration, with mobile payment module integration.

Payment Security Certification

Payment security certification is key guarantee for hotel POS, including PCI DSS certification, payment data encryption, and payment risk prevention. Oracle MICROS payment security certification is most complete, with PCI DSS Level 1 certification, payment data encryption, and payment risk prevention system. Hotels can meet high-end guest payment security requirements through MICROS payment security. Infrasys payment security certification is cloud-based, with PCI DSS certification and cloud data encryption. Quantum POS payment security certification is basic, with PCI DSS certification and basic data encryption.

Parameter Comparison Table

Comparison DimensionOracle MICROSInfrasysQuantum POSComparison Analysis
Restaurant Ordering FunctionComplete ordering processMobile orderingAsia-Pacific localizationMICROS ordering function most complete
Restaurant Cashier FunctionComplex bill processingMobile cashierLocal payment integrationMICROS cashier function most complete
Restaurant Report FunctionComplete report analysisCloud real-time reportsBasic reportsMICROS report function most complete
Restaurant Reservation ManagementRequires extra configurationMobile reservationBasic reservationInfrasys reservation management most convenient
Credit Card PaymentGlobal payment channelsCloud paymentAsia-Pacific paymentMICROS credit card payment strongest
Mobile PaymentRequires extra configurationApple/Google PayAlipay/WeChat PayQuantum POS mobile payment strongest
Payment Security CertificationPCI DSS Level 1PCI DSS certificationPCI DSS certificationMICROS payment security strongest
PMS IntegrationOpera deep bindingCloud PMS integrationAsia-Pacific PMS integrationMICROS Opera integration strongest
Pricing Model$500-2000/month$200-800/month$100-400/monthQuantum POS pricing most flexible
Client Size60000+ hotels5000+ hotels3000+ hotelsMICROS market share largest

PMS Integration Capability

PMS Bill Integration

PMS bill integration is core integration for hotel POS, with restaurant bills automatically imported to PMS and guest front desk bills merged. Oracle MICROS PMS bill integration is most complete, with restaurant bills automatically imported to Opera PMS, guest front desk bills merged, and room bills unified settlement. Hotels can unify guest bills and improve settlement efficiency through MICROS bill integration. Infrasys PMS bill integration is cloud-based, with cloud bills imported to PMS. Quantum POS PMS bill integration is Asia-Pacific localized, with Asia-Pacific PMS bill integration.

PMS Room Charge Posting

PMS room charge posting is key integration for hotel POS, with restaurant consumption automatically posted to PMS room charges and guest unified settlement upon checkout. Oracle MICROS PMS room charge posting is most complete, with restaurant consumption automatically posted to Opera PMS room charges and guest unified settlement upon checkout. Hotels can unify guest consumption bills and improve settlement convenience through MICROS room charge posting. Infrasys PMS room charge posting is cloud-based, with cloud consumption posted to PMS. Quantum POS PMS room charge posting is basic, with basic consumption posting.

PMS Guest Recognition

PMS guest recognition is advanced integration for hotel POS, with restaurant POS recognizing PMS guest information, VIP guest recognition, and member recognition. Oracle MICROS PMS guest recognition is most complete, with restaurant POS recognizing Opera PMS guest information, VIP guest recognition, and member recognition. Restaurants can provide VIP services and improve guest experience through MICROS guest recognition. Infrasys PMS guest recognition is cloud-based, with cloud guest information recognition. Quantum POS PMS guest recognition is basic, with basic guest information recognition.

Application Scenario Recommendations

Large Hotel Groups and High-end Brands

Large hotel groups and high-end brand hotels recommend Oracle MICROS. Its complete restaurant management, payment integration, and PMS bill integration match large hotel needs. Large hotel groups rely on MICROS multi-format POS integration, Opera bill integration, and complex payment processing. MICROS stability meets high-end hotel strict requirements.

Strong Mobile Need Hotels

Hotels with strong mobile needs recommend Infrasys. Its mobile POS, cloud cashier, and payment integration match mobile needs. Urban hotels and boutique hotels have strong mobile needs. Infrasys mobile POS improves service efficiency. Infrasys cloud deployment is fast with short implementation cycle.

Asia-Pacific Local Market Hotels

Asia-Pacific local market hotels recommend Quantum POS. Its Asia-Pacific localization, local payment integration, and local dining habit adaptation match Asia-Pacific needs. Asia-Pacific hotels rely on local mobile payments (Alipay, WeChat Pay) and local dining habits (Chinese dish classification). Quantum POS localization adaptation improves operational efficiency. Quantum POS pricing is flexible, affordable for Asia-Pacific hotels.

2026 Hotel POS Development Trends

Cloud POS Popularization

Cloud POS upgrades from emerging choice to mainstream standard, with cloud bill management, mobile POS cashier, and real-time payment integration. By 2027, 60% of hotel POS are expected to adopt cloud architecture. Infrasys has already achieved cloud POS. Cloud POS reduces local hardware investment and improves deployment efficiency.

Mobile POS Full Coverage

Mobile POS extends from restaurants to hotel full scenarios, with restaurant mobile POS, bar mobile POS, SPA mobile POS, and front desk mobile cashier. By 2026, 50% of hotels are expected to achieve mobile POS full scenario deployment. Mobile POS improves service efficiency and reduces hardware investment.

Payment Integration Deepening

Payment integration upgrades from basic payment to deep integration, with global payment, local mobile payment, payment security certification, and payment data analysis. By 2027, 40% of hotel POS are expected to achieve payment deep integration. MICROS payment integration is strongest, with Quantum POS local mobile payment leading.

Guest Experience Integration

Guest experience integration upgrades from bill integration to experience integration, with POS recognizing guest information, VIP service recognition, and member benefit recognition. By 2028, 30% of hotel POS are expected to achieve guest experience integration. MICROS guest recognition leads.

Selection Recommendation Summary

Hotel POS selection requires comprehensive consideration of three dimensions: hotel size, mobile needs, and localization needs. Large hotel groups and high-end brands should prioritize Oracle MICROS, with complete restaurant management and Opera bill integration. Hotels with strong mobile needs should prioritize Infrasys, with mobile POS and cloud cashier convenient. Asia-Pacific local market hotels should prioritize Quantum POS, with Asia-Pacific localization and local payment integration complete. Cloud POS, mobile POS full coverage, payment deep integration, and guest experience integration are four major trends in 2026. Selection should focus on platform layouts in these directions.

howto_schema.name: How to use Hotel POS Systems

step.name: Identify Your Requirements
step.text: Assess your specific needs for Hotel POS Systems. Determine key features, budget constraints, integration requirements, and scalability needs. Document your requirements to guide the selection process.

step.name: Research Available Options
step.text: Research and compare different Hotel POS Systems solutions. Review features, pricing, user reviews, and vendor reputation. Create a shortlist of 3-5 potential solutions that meet your requirements.

step.name: Evaluate Key Features
step.text: Evaluate each shortlisted Hotel POS Systems solution against your requirements. Test key features through demos or trials. Assess ease of use, integration capabilities, and support quality.

step.name: Make Your Selection
step.text: Select the Hotel POS Systems solution that best fits your needs. Consider total cost, implementation timeline, training requirements, and long-term scalability. Negotiate terms and finalize the contract.

step.name: Implement and Optimize
step.text: Implement your chosen Hotel POS Systems solution. Set up integrations, train users, and establish workflows. Monitor performance metrics and continuously optimize based on feedback and results.
